name_cn:
🎉New Arrival 1BB149 Small🎉🎉
This top-handle bag made of natural grain leather reinterprets a soft silhouette and can be carried by hand or with a detachable shoulder strap. It comes with 2 detachable tassels. Metal hardware. Features a debossed letter logo on the front, zip closure, and two pockets (one with a zip). Large capacity, another timeless bestseller. Hurry and get yours!🎉
28x20x13cm🎉🎉🎉💰💰💰
92698880
